corrections.note: No comma after μετανοοῦντες in the printed text.
The printed text has a raised full stop after ἄφρονες, not a Greek middle dot; transcript punctuation mark shape is normalized.
Final omega has circumflex in the print.

corrections.current: 3 ερουσιν] pr και A | om εν ℵ** (hab ℵc.a) | ℵd
corrections.correct: 3 ερουσιν] pr και A | om εν ℵ** (hab ℵc.a) ℵd
corrections.note: There is no separator bar before ℵd; it continues the same note.
The apparatus reads ημιν τ°] pr εν A, with superscript omission sign after τ, not τῷ.

corrections.current: τροπιος (-πιας ℵ** πεως ℵc.a)] τριβων Bb
corrections.correct: τροπιος (-πιας ℵ** τρόπιος ℵc.a)] τριβων Bb
corrections.note: The transcript's 'πεως' does not match the printed correction after ℵc.a; the print appears to repeat the corrected reading, likely τρόπιος.

uncertain.note: Printed mark is a high point/raised stop; transcript uses Greek middle dot. Likely acceptable normalization depending on project conventions.
The exact letters in the ℵc.a parenthetical are hard to read; transcript's 'πεως' is clearly wrong, but the precise replacement is somewhat uncertain from the scan.

notes: Running head and page number match. Body is largely accurate. Bottom numbers 611 and QQ 2 are page/footer elements, not marginalia needing correction.
